rows.label: qev086408_MSG0001
rows.name: Please take good care of Tatsu, friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0002
rows.name:
Are you sure you don't want
to stay with your family?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev086408_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him families should stick together.

rows.label: qev086408_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev086408_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him he should stay (in case you need rations...).

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0003
rows.name: Friends not need Tatsu anymore?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0004
rows.name: Yeaaah, actually we never really...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0005
rows.name: What did Lin-san say?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0006
rows.name: Nothing! Nothing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0007
rows.name: Of COURSE friends need Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0008
rows.name:
And if friends beg this much, Tatsu
have no choice but to come with them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0009
rows.name:
Great. Now the little potato
is going to have a huge head.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0010
rows.name: Of course, the head IS the best part...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0011
rows.name: BLADE is true home of Tatsu now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0012
rows.name:
Besides, now Tatsu can come back
and visit caravan anytime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0013
rows.name: This is true.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0014
rows.name:
Just remember—Tatsu is next in
line to be caravan leader.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0015
rows.name:
Work hard with nice friends and
become Nopon worthy of title.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0016
rows.name: Er, he's going to lead you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0017
rows.name:
Did Kaka forget to mention? Present
leader of Dodonga Caravan is Kaka.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0018
rows.name: WHAT?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0019
rows.name:
So one day Tatsu will follow
in footsteps of mamapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0020
rows.name:
Then Tatsu be most important
Nopon in caravan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0021
rows.name:
This is legendary Nopon spice.
Kaka want friends to have it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0022
rows.name: Really? Gee, thanks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0023
rows.name:
Okay, Mamapon. Tatsu leaving,
but will visit again soon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086408_MSG0024
rows.name: Mamapon will be waiting![ST:wait ]
